title: Sewer Gate: Below the City’s Breath
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, iron sewer gate opened into darkness, lantern glow, damp stone, cinematic, no text
description:
The air changes at the sewer gate.

Above: smoke, sweat, and war.

Below: wet stone and older secrets.

choices.label: Begin the descent into the underways.

title: Sewer Junction: Three Flows
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sewer junction with three channels, drifting debris, lantern reflections, cinematic, no text
description:
Three channels diverge.

One smells of rot.

One smells of mushrooms.

One smells… clean. Too clean.

choices.label: Follow the rot channel (rats and swarms).
Follow the ‘too clean’ channel (someone lives down here).

title: Sewer Run: Teeth in the Dark
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, rats swarming across wet stones, lantern light, boots splashing, cinematic, no text
description:
Rats pour from cracks.

You can run, fight, or climb to a maintenance ledge.

choices.label: Fight.
Run hard and lose them (take 1 damage).

title: Ratcatcher Nook
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, small sewer nook with dry platform, rat traps, lantern, a figure waiting, cinematic, no text
description:
A dry platform. Traps. A lantern that doesn’t flicker.

Pella watches you like you’re the danger.

"You want the old underways? Then talk."

talk.text: Pella taps a hooked pole on stone.

choices.label: Talk to Pella.
Start: Gather the Lumen Key.
Proceed to the old underways threshold.

title: Underway Threshold: Old Stone, Older Wards
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ancient stone archway under city, faint glowing ward lines, cinematic, no text
description:
An archway cut with precise stonework.

Faint ward-lines shimmer when your lantern passes.

Pella whispers: "Don’t step on the bright lines."

choices.label: Use ward salt to reveal safe steps (reduces risk).
Proceed without ward salt (risk a ward sting).

title: Echo Caves: The Sound of Footsteps
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cavern where every drip echoes, chalky stone, distant shapes, cinematic, no text
description:
Every step echoes too long.

Something hears you.

Something moves where echoes don’t reach.

choices.label: Shadows resolve into thralls—avoid or fight.

title: Fungal Grove: Breath Held
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, glowing fungi grove, spores in air like dust motes, eerie beauty, cinematic, no text
description:
Glowing fungi like lanterns that hate you.

Spores drift.

Pella’s advice returns: hold your breath.

choices.label: Fight through the thralls.
Drink fungal tonic (if you have one) to resist spores.

title: Ward Shrine: Lumen Fragment
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, small shrine with glowing crystal fragment embedded, old ward carvings, cinematic, no text
description:
A small shrine. Wards carved like handwriting.

A crystal fragment sits in the center—part of a key.

Taking it may wake the shrine’s guardians.

choices.label: Take the Lumen Key Fragment.

title: Basalt Steps: Under-Fortress Descent
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, descending basalt stairs into ancient fortress, cold blue light, cinematic, no text
description:
Basalt steps descend into a place built for war long before your city existed.

Below: warders.

Below: a vault door that remembers being closed.

choices.label: A warder blocks the way—fight.

title: Chamber of Seals: Second Fragment
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sealed chamber with crystal fragment in ironwork, ward glyphs, cinematic, no text
description:
The chamber is all seals and silence.

A second key fragment is mounted in ironwork.

A faint hum resonates in your teeth.

choices.label: Take the second fragment.

title: Gallery: The Glass Eye
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fortress gallery with hanging charms and bones, shaman silhouette, crystal glint, cinematic, no text
description:
Charms sway without wind.

A shaman’s eye glints like glass.

"You come for the city’s sight," it says.

"Then pay in fear."

choices.label: Fight the Shaman of the Glass Eye.

title: Shaman’s Relics: Third Fragment and Shard
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fallen shaman, crystal shard and key fragment on cloth, eerie blue glow, cinematic, no text
description:
The shaman’s charms fall silent.

You take the third fragment.

You also take a shard of scrying crystal—proof the vault holds the real prize.

choices.label: Go to the Lumen Vault Door.

title: The Lumen Vault Door
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, massive vault door with crystal keyholes, faint ward glow, cinematic, no text
description:
A door built to outlast kings.

Three key sockets wait.

If you have the fragments, the door will remember how to open.

choices.label: Insert the 3 fragments and unlock the vault.
You lack fragments—retreat and search for more.

title: Lumen Vault: The City’s Sight
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, glowing crystal vault chamber, crystal ball on pedestal, ward light swirling, cinematic, no text
description:
The crystal ball sits on a pedestal like a calm moon.

When you touch it, you feel the city above—like a heartbeat through stone.

This will change the war.

choices.label: Take the Crystal Ball of Lumen.

title: Escape Run: Upward to War
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, running through underways with crystal glow in pack, shadows chasing, cinematic, no text
description:
The underways feel narrower on the way back.

As if the fortress resents you.

Above, the city will need this sight before the next assault.

choices.label: Return to the Mage Tower with the crystal ball.
